Closes #{GH ISSUE NUM}

# Type

Chose the type of PR this is, these can be one of: major version update, minor version update, bug fix and hot fix

# Description

Explain the purpose of the PR and its contents here.

# Test

Explain how it has been tested to ensure minimal problems, and potentially the length of time it has been tested.
On a hot fix this section can optionally be removed.

# Steps before merge

- [ ] Check for missing in code docs
- [ ] Ensure in code docs are correct
- [ ] Run cargo fmt
- [ ] Run cargo clippy, and fix the issues provided
- [ ] Update changelog
